creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
(In reply to Jason E. Hale from comment #5)
> no member named 'sZlib' in 'struct mng_data_struct'

Strange, it rebuilt fine for me here...

> What was the purpose of your removal of patch-conf in [1]?

Oh... I deleted that file in preparation for the (not yet committed) upgrade of libmng to 2.0.3. And then I upgraded sst. Although sst has nothing to do with MNG, because I omitted the "." in "git commit .", git included my the other change too :(

> Could you please just revert that commit?

I restored the patch in question. This should address both this PR as well as the PR 276182.

I still want to upgrade MNG to 2.0.3 soon, though -- the only change, despite the seemingly big version-jump, is the compatibility with lcms-2.x
